bibliographic_info.title: Orbit determination, clock estimation and performance evaluation of BDS-3 PPP-B2b service

grounding_quotes: <!-- PAGE: 1 -->  JournalofGeodesy(2022)96:60 https://doi.org/10.1007/s00190-022-01642-9 ORIGINAL ARTICLE Orbit determination, clock estimation and performance evaluation of BDS-3 PPP-B2b service Chengpan Tang1·Xiaogong Hu1,3·Jinping Chen2·Li Liu2·Shanshi Zhou1·Rui Guo2·Xiaojie Li1,2·Feng He5· Jinhuo Liu1,4·Jianhua Yang1,4 Received:29November2020/Accepted:14July2022/Publishedonline:29August2022 ©S
Finally, the PPP-B2b performance is validated by both the static PPP process and simulated kinematic PPP process.
